fact_nuggets.text: Stamina redirects here. For other uses, see Stamina (disambiguation). Stamina (Japanese: Stamina) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. Prior to Generation IX, it was the signature Ability of Mudbray and Mudsdale.
Signature Ability of Mudbray And Mudsdale

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Stamina is hit by an attack, its Defense rises by one stage. If a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Stamina has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Stamina is hit by an attack, its Defense rises by one stage. If a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability.
Raises this Pokemon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.
